title: Manufacturing Engineer - ABB India Capital India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ABB India Capital India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
ABB India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ABB India Capital India:
ABB India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India Capital India!
